summary: Iteration 111 - Carbon Score Analytics Dashboard Testing COMPLETE. All 15 backend tests pass. Frontend cooperative carbon analytics page fully functional with KPI cards, bar chart, pie chart, radar chart, and ranking table with expandable rows. Farmer carbon score page has 3 working tabs (Vue generale, Graphiques, Classement). Quick Actions panel has Analytiques button linking to /cooperative/carbon-analytics.

minor.issue: Parcels sorted by stored carbon_score but response shows recalculated score - may cause minor ordering inconsistencies

critical_code_review_comments: Backend cooperative_parcels.py lines 576-721: GET /api/cooperative/carbon-analytics endpoint correctly returns resume, distribution, decomposition_moyenne, and parcelles array with all required fields
Backend uses calculate_carbon_score() to recalculate scores on-the-fly, ensuring fresh data but may differ from stored carbon_score used for sorting
Frontend CarbonScoreAnalytics.jsx: Well-structured with recharts integration for BarChart, PieChart, and RadarChart
Frontend CarbonScorePage.jsx: Clean tab implementation with Vue generale, Graphiques, and Classement tabs
QuickActionsPanel.jsx: Analytiques button correctly placed in 'Carbone & Durabilite' category with data-testid='qa-analytiques'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Carbon analytics dashboard fully tested. Cooperative account has 9 parcels with scores ranging from 1.2 to 2.8. Farmer test account has no parcels (shows empty states). The recharts library (v3.6.0) is working correctly for all chart types.

backend_apis: GET /api/cooperative/carbon-analytics - PASSED: Returns resume, distribution, decomposition_moyenne, parcelles

GET /api/cooperative/carbon-analytics distribution - PASSED: excellent, tres_bon, bon, en_progression, insuffisant counts
GET /api/cooperative/carbon-analytics parcelles - PASSED: id, rang, score, niveau, co2_tonnes, prime_farmer_xof, decomposition, recommandations
GET /api/cooperative/carbon-analytics unauthorized - PASSED: Returns 401/403 without token
GET /api/greenlink/carbon/my-score - PASSED: Returns average_score, breakdown, recommendations, parcels
GET /api/farmer/carbon-premiums/my-requests - PASSED: Returns premium requests data

Data integrity: parcelles array length matches total_parcelles - PASSED
Data integrity: prime calculations are non-negative - PASSED
Data integrity: scores are within 0-10 range - PASSED
